text.title: guardrails-custom-pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for guardrails-custom-pipeline as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running content moderation on every request without tiering, including the LLM-as-judge hallucination check.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLM-based checks add 500ms-2s per call. Running them on every request multiplies the pipeline latency. Reserve expensive checks for ambiguous cases that pass the fast tiers, or for post-hoc sampling in production monitoring.

failure-mode.description: Building a GuardrailsPipeline singleton that holds OpenAI client state across concurrent requests without connection pooling.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The OpenAI client is not thread-safe by default when the same underlying HTTP connection is reused. Use an AsyncOpenAI client with the async pipeline for concurrent request handling, or use a thread-local client pattern.
